heading: Lender Oversight Committee
label: 657u Lender Oversight Committee
notes: Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–189, § 3(d)(2)132 Stat. 1496June 21, 2018“Any reference in a law, regulation, guidance, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Lender Oversight Committee of the Small Business Administration shall be deemed a reference to the Lender Oversight Committee, established under section 48 of the Small Business Act [], as added by subsection (a).”15 U.S.C. 657u

Transfer of Functions, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–189, § 3(c)(2)132 Stat. 1496June 21, 2018“All functions of the Lender Oversight Committee of the Small Business Administration, including the personnel, assets, and obligations of the Lender Oversight Committee, as in existence on the day before the date of the enactment of this Act [], shall be transferred to the Lender Oversight Committee established under section 48 of the Small Business Act [], as added by subsection (a).”June 21, 201815 U.S.C. 657u

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established within the Administration the Lender Oversight Committee (in this section referred to as the “Committee”).
3 members shall be voting members, 2 of whom shall be career appointees in the Senior Executive Service (as defined in ); andsection 3132 of title 5
the remaining members shall be nonvoting members who shall serve in an advisory capacity on the Committee.
review reports on lender oversight activities;

review formal enforcement action recommendations of the Director of the Office of Credit Risk Management with respect to any lender making loans under and any Lending Partner or Intermediary participant of the Administration in a lending program of the Office of Capital Access of the Administration;section 636(a) of this title

in carrying out paragraph (2) with respect to formal enforcement actions taken under subsection (d) or (e) of , vote to recommend or not recommend action to the Administrator or a designee of the Administrator;section 650 of this title
in carrying out paragraph (2) with respect to any formal enforcement action not specified under subsection (d) or (e) of , vote to approve, disapprove, or modify the action;section 650 of this title
review, in an advisory capacity, any lender oversight, portfolio risk management, or program integrity matters brought by the Director; and
take such other actions and perform such other functions as may be delegated to the Committee by the Administrator.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Committee shall meet as necessary, but not less frequently than on a quarterly basis.

children.heading: Reports
children.label: 2 Reports
children.text: The Committee shall submit to the Administrator a report detailing each meeting of the Committee, including if the Committee does or does not vote to approve a formal enforcement action of the Director of the Office of Credit Risk Management with respect to a lender.
